description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs. The job named job runs in the default test stage using the ubuntu:16.04 image and executes: export TERM=xterm-256color, echo $TERM, echo -e '\\033[31mfox', echo -e '\\0;31mfox', echo -e '\\u001b[31mfox', echo -e "\\e[31mfox". The job named node-job runs in the default test stage using the bitnami/node:10-prod image and executes the same TERM and color echo commands, then runs npm install, FORCE_COLOR=1 node index.js, node index.js --color=256, and FORCE_COLOR=1 npx snail-runner ls ls. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
